headline: These 2 Industrial Giants Have Crushed Tesla's Returns Over the Last 12 Months. Will The Party Continue?
summary: Tesla's stock has gone up 14% over the past year, which is pretty good, but it still pales in comparison to Cat and GE Vernova.
